questionHtml: Sketch, on the axes, a graph to show the variation of gravitational potential energy with time for the bob and the object after the collision. The data from the graph used in (a) is shown as a dashed line for reference.
markschemeHtml:
graph with same period but inverted ✔

amplitude one half of the original/two boxes throughout (by eye) ✔
